title: scleria paupercula
intro: Scleria paupercula, also known as the small umbrella sedge, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, Scleria paupercula has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions, among others. Scleria paupercula can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is often used in traditional herbal preparations, although its efficacy and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
